title: lepisorus clathratus
intro: Lepisorus clathratus, also known as the net-veined fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Blechnaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe and protect the skin and mucous membranes. The health benefits of Lepisorus clathratus include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory health, making it a popular remedy for conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. Lepisorus clathratus can be prepared in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the dried plant material in hot water or a solvent.
